title: AssetStatus
content:
# AssetStatus


## Properties

- **data** (`array`): A dictionary with a data property that contains an array of all Assets and their corresponding current status (`state`).

data.description: A dictionary with a data property that contains an array of all Assets and their corresponding current status (`state`).

name.description: Unique identifier `name` for the Asset. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
